description_long: This rifle features a distinctive skeletonized wooden stock with two large cutouts, providing both reduced weight and a unique visual profile. The receiver and barrel assembly are finished in a matte black, contrasting sharply with the warm brown of the stock. The rifle is equipped with a detachable box magazine and a prominent suppressor attached to the end of the barrel, indicating a design optimized for reduced firing noise. The pistol grip is integrated into the receiver, and the overall silhouette is streamlined and modern. Iron sights are mounted along the top of the receiver and barrel, suitable for quick target acquisition. The combination of wood and metal materials gives the rifle a blend of traditional and tactical aesthetics.
description: A modern rifle with a skeletonized wooden stock, matte black receiver and barrel, detachable box magazine, and an integrated suppressor.
description_view_0: Side view showing the skeletonized wooden stock, black receiver, suppressor, and magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular suppressor opening and narrow profile of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same skeletonized stock, receiver, and suppressor details.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock's cutouts and the alignment of the barrel and suppressor.
